manifiesto.title: The jungle to explore. Here to rest.
manifiesto.body: Aruma is three designer apartments, considered down to the last detail — the way you'd think through a home. After a day of jungle and Falls, you come back to the pool, the jacuzzi, an en-suite bath: comfort, calm and design in the heart of Puerto Iguazú.

units.sectionTitle: Each unit, another way to come back from the jungle.

yvyra.name: Suite Yvyrá
yvyra.sub: up to 8 guests · 3-bedroom duplex · 3 bathrooms · pool with jacuzzi · wifi

mberu.name: Departamento Mberú
mberu.sub: up to 6 guests · 2 bedrooms · 2 bathrooms (one en-suite) · upper floor · balcony overlooking the pool · equipped kitchen · wifi

tatu.name: Cabaña Tatú
tatu.sub: up to 5 guests · 2 bedrooms · full kitchen · washer · pool access · wifi · DirectTV

experiencias.title: The Falls, unhurried.
experiencias.body: We give you much more than a place to sleep. We put together a tailor-made guide to what's really worth doing in Iguazú and connect you with trusted locals to book every excursion.
experiencias.caption: Devil's Throat · Iguazú Falls

nature.title: Nature
nature.desc: The Falls, the National Park and the Paraná rainforest, minutes away.

gastronomy.title: Gastronomy
gastronomy.desc: The tables and flavors you shouldn't miss in the Triple Frontier.

frontier.title: Triple Frontier
frontier.desc: Cross into Brazil and Paraguay in the same day, hassle-free.

activities.title: Activities
activities.desc: Rafting, horseback riding, bird watching and more adventures.

relato.intro: A walk through Aruma in photos: from the first dip in the pool to the last thoughtfully chosen corner.

llegada.c: Cross the garden and the turquoise water is already waiting.

descenso.c: A few steps among autumn maples and you're at the pool's edge.

agua.c: Sunlight scattered over the warm coping: the midday pause.

refugio.c: The cabin peeks out among the palms, level with the water.

selva.c: Orchids on the trunk and open sky between the leaves.

iris.c: Flowers that open with the morning dew.

heliconia.c: The tropical red that grows in the damp.

adentro.c: Objects chosen with care for every room.

descanso.c: En-suite bathrooms with fine materials and soft light.

rincon.c: Nothing left to chance, down to the last artwork.

cta.title: Ready to arrive in Iguazú?
cta.body: Book directly with us: instant confirmation and real, human attention — no middlemen.

contacto.title: We're one message away.
contacto.whatsappTitle: You'll hear back from us directly, usually within 24 h.
contacto.address: Santa María del Iguazú esq. Obispo Angelelli — Puerto Iguazú, Misiones, Argentina
contacto.addressNote: Right in downtown Puerto Iguazú, minutes from the Falls and steps from everything.

form.name: Name
form.message: How do you picture your stay?
form.sentMsg: Thank you — we received your message. We'll reply shortly.

footer.tagline: Signature apartments in the heart of Puerto Iguazú, Misiones, Argentina.

departamento.subtitle: Design, comfort and first-class amenities, in the heart of Iguazú.

spaceBody.yvyra: A duplex designed for groups and families: 3 bedrooms (2 with a double bed and one with 3 single beds) plus a sofa in the living room, for up to 8 guests. 3 bathrooms, equipped kitchen, dining room and bedrooms on the upper floor. With free on-site parking and access to the pool with hydromassage jacuzzi, in the heart of Puerto Iguazú and minutes from the Falls.
spaceBody.mberu: A bright upper-floor apartment: 2 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms (one en-suite), an equipped kitchen, living and dining rooms, and a balcony overlooking the pool. With pool access, in the heart of Puerto Iguazú and minutes from the Falls.
spaceBody.tatu: A cabin with everything you need: two bedrooms, a full bathroom, a fully equipped kitchen and a laundry room with washer. With pool access, in the heart of Puerto Iguazú and minutes from the Falls.

legal.cancelIntro: We know plans change. These are the terms we work with, the same for every unit and every payment method.
legal.cancelH1: Cancelling 7 or more days in advance
legal.cancelP1: We refund 100% of what you paid. The refund goes back through the same method you used and may take up to 10 business days to appear, depending on your bank or card issuer.
legal.cancelP2: No refund applies. Let us know anyway: if we manage to rebook those dates, we'll return whatever we're able to recover.
legal.cancelP3: If you don't arrive and didn't tell us, it counts as a cancellation within 7 days: no refund applies.
legal.cancelP4: With 7 or more days' notice you can move your booking to other dates within the same year, subject to availability and the rate for the new dates. Message us on WhatsApp and we'll sort it out.
legal.cancelP5: If circumstances beyond our control mean we can't host you, we refund 100% regardless of when it happens, and we'll help you find equivalent lodging nearby.
legal.cancelP6: Message us on WhatsApp at +54 9 3757 652002 with your booking code. The date and time of your message is what counts.
legal.privacyIntro: This notice explains what data we keep about you, what for, and how to ask us to delete it. It applies to Aruma Lodge and to bookings made through this site.
legal.privacyP1: When you book we ask for your first and last name, email and phone number. If you pay by bank transfer, we also store the receipt you upload. If you pay by card, Mercado Pago handles the card details directly: we never see or store them.
legal.privacyP2: Only to manage your booking: confirming it, arranging check-in, issuing your receipt, and contacting you if something comes up during your stay. We don't use it for advertising and we don't send newsletters.
legal.privacyP3: Nobody, apart from the services we need for the booking to work: Mercado Pago (payment processing), Supabase (database and receipt storage) and Google Calendar (occupancy schedule). We don't sell or hand data to third parties.
legal.privacyP4: Booking data is kept as long as we need it to meet our accounting and tax obligations. Transfer receipts are stored in a private space that isn't publicly accessible.
legal.privacyP5: You can ask us at any time to access, correct or delete your data by writing to arumalodge.iguazu@gmail.com. We reply within 10 calendar days.
legal.privacyP6: We use Google Analytics to understand how the site is browsed (page views, where visitors come from). This is aggregate data and doesn't identify you personally. You can block it from your browser settings.
legal.privacyP7: For any question about your data: arumalodge.iguazu@gmail.com or WhatsApp +54 9 3757 652002.
